name: Zuppa Di Fagioli Con La Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Dry white beans (Great Northern or Navy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beans and water in a large pot and bring to a boil.
2. Remove from heat and let stand for 1 hour.
3. Return to medium heat and add olive oil, ham, onion, celery, garlic, salt, and pepper.
4. Cook for 3 hours.
5. Add spaghetti and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes until tender.
6. Serve in soup bowls and top with generous spoonfuls of Parmesan cheese. Serves 4 to 6.
